overall.description: Static first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom in a video game. The scene shows a messy bed, large windows with blinds revealing a hazy orange sky with distant fires, and a television cycling through various colorful advertisements. The atmosphere is moody and dystopian with warm amber lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with entertainment screen

events.description: television screen switches from abstract colorful pattern to yellow advertisement with 'ALL' text
television displays news broadcast with 'DTR' logo and corporate branding
television shows animated advertisement with cartoon character and rainbow graphics

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, observing the television advertisements and the hazy cityscape outside the window

entered.detail: messy bed with white and grey sheets, pillows scattered
large windows with horizontal blinds showing orange hazy sky and distant fires outside
large flatscreen TV displaying various colorful advertisements and news broadcasts
distinctive curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
dark furniture piece with small lamp and decorative items
glowing neon wall decoration with abstract patterns

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk apartment bedroom during a hazy golden hour. The unmade bed sits in the foreground while a television cycles through various advertisements on the right. Through the slatted window blinds, an orange-tinted sky with visible fires suggests a dystopian urban environment outside. The room features a distinctive curved wooden ceiling and warm ambient lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom, capturing a mood of dystopian stillness during a hazy golden hour. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground, while a television to the right cycles through a series of colorful advertisements. The gaze then drifts toward the slatted window blinds, where the warm ambient lighting of the room meets the oppressive orange tint of the exterior sky. Finally, the scene settles on the distant fires visible through the blinds, contrasting the interior's curved wooden ceiling with the chaotic urban environment outside.
